news.headline: Coinbase urges Congress to give CFTC control over digital assets, shifting oversight from SEC.
news.summary: Representatives from the cryptocurrency sector are actively advocating in Congress to transfer regulatory control of digital assets from the SEC to the CFTC. This move is being pursued as a means to address concerns and establish clear regulatory guidelines for the industry. The CFTC would potentially oversee the regulation of cryptocurrencies and other digital assets if the transition occurs. This effort comes amidst a growing market cap of over $2 trillion for the overall cryptocurrency market, highlighting the importance of establishing effective regulatory frameworks.

news.headline: Ivanti announces 2024 Partner of the Year Award winners in Salt Lake City, celebrating top-performing partners.
news.summary: In Salt Lake City, Ivanti, a software company facilitating seamless integration between IT and security for optimal work environments, disclosed the victorious recipients of the 2024 Partner of the Year Awards. The accolades honor leading partners who have showcased outstanding outcomes and contributed significantly through their collaboration in the previous year. Michelle Hodges, the SVP of Global Sales, expressed pride in acknowledging and honoring the exceptional partners and their accomplishments.

news.headline: Blueprint Sports acquires SANIL, creating a $100M+ NIL powerhouse agency. In 2024 they delivered $108M in NIL payments.
news.summary: Blueprint Sports, a prominent agency specializing in Name, Image, and Likeness (NIL) services for college athletic departments and student-athletes, has recently acquired SANIL, a key player in the NIL field. Together, they raised and distributed a noteworthy $108 million in NIL payments to student-athletes from 70 collegiate athletic departments in the year 2024. This acquisition solidifies their position as leaders in the industry, showcasing their ability to generate substantial revenue for student-athletes through effective NIL strategies.

news.headline: USSBC takes 12 AAM companies to Saudi Arabia for business mission from Feb 3-6, 2025. Exciting developments in air mobility sector.
news.summary: A delegation of 12 advanced air mobility companies, led by the U.S.-Saudi Business Council (USSBC), undertook a business development trip to Jeddah and Riyadh, Saudi Arabia from February 3-6, 2025. The delegation showcased state-of-the-art AAM products in a bid to foster business relationships.

news.headline: PPL's campaign raised $9 million to aid communities, employees, and retirees.
news.summary: In Allentown, Pennsylvania, on February 19, 2025, employees and retirees of PPL Corporation, along with contributions from PPL's affiliated foundations, committed close to $9 million in donations through PPL's yearly employee-run charitable fundraising effort. This significant amount raised will be utilized in collaboration with...

news.headline: US 20-Year Bond Auction
Arista Networks reports 25% Q4 growth with $1.93B sales, surpassing expectations; Analysts maintain Neutral rating.
news.summary: Despite reporting positive fourth-quarter results, shares of Arista Networks Inc (NYSE:ANET) were trading lower. In an exciting earnings season, the company posted sales of $1.93 billion, marking a 25% increase year-on-year and surpassing Street predictions by 1.5%. Analyst James Fish of Piper Sandler reiterated a Neutral rating but upped the price target from $106 to $108. He noted that the growth was fueled by Services, although product billings slowed to 20%. CATs (Cloud & AI Titans) accounted for 48% of full-year revenues. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Nodal Exchange to expand headquarters in Fairfax County, increasing capacity at 1921 Gallows Road. Governor announces.
news.summary: Earlier today, Governor Glenn Youngkin revealed that Nodal Exchange is set to expand its headquarters at 1921 Gallows Road in Tysons, increasing capacity and potentially creating more job opportunities in the area.

news.headline: LDA introduces advanced healthcare data integration solution to transform data archiving and management.
news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina on February 19, 2025, a prominent healthcare data archiving and integration provider, Legacy Data Access (LDA), revealed its latest innovation - an advanced data integration solution. This cutting-edge tool aims to revolutionize the way healthcare providers handle historical data.

news.headline: Jane Software Inc. appoints Dan Davidow as Chief Marketing Officer to drive global growth and innovation.
news.summary: In Vancouver, BC on February 19, 2025, Jane Software Inc. revealed the selection of Dan Davidow as the new Chief Marketing Officer (CMO). Davidow, a veteran marketing executive with prior roles at companies like Stripe, will now oversee all marketing strategies for the prominent clinic management software and EMR provider.

news.headline: Unlikely Collaborators awards grant to Jimmy Miller Memorial Foundation to expand ocean therapy and mental health initiatives.Characters: 111
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, Unlikely Collaborators revealed their grant to the Jimmy Miller Memorial Foundation (JMMF) in Los Angeles. The grant aims to assist JMMF's innovative efforts in surf therapy, a method known for enhancing mental health. The collaboration underscores Unlikely Collaborators' commitment to supporting mental well-being initiatives.

AMG to release Q4 & full-year 2024 financial results on Feb 26, 2025, at 18:00 CET. Earnings call on Feb 27, 2025, at 15:00 CET.
news.summary: The multinational company AMG Critical Materials N.V. (AMG) listed on EURONEXT AMSTERDAM as "AMG" is scheduled to announce its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on February 26, 2025, around 18:00 CET. A conference call will be held on February 27, 2025, at 15:00 CET (14:00 GMT / 9:00 AM EST) to discuss the Q4 2024 results.

news.headline: Cornerstone Building Brands renews partnership with Lady A for Home for Good project, pledges donation to Habitat for Humanity.
news.summary: A well-known building company, Cornerstone Building Brands, headquartered in Cary, North Carolina, has appointed Lady A as the ambassador for their ambitious 2025 Home for Good project. This partnership extension involves a commitment to donating a significant amount to Habitat for Humanity.

news.headline: Treasury WI 20-year yield 4.820% before $16 billion auction.
Clubtails releases new tropical flavors for spring, expanding lineup of ready-to-drink cocktails. Party-ready cans! - Reuters
news.summary: In Rochester, New York on February 19, 2025, Geloso Beverage Group's Clubtails - The Original Cocktail in a Can and Clubtails Crushers, popular ready-to-drink cocktail brands, are introducing new tropical cocktail flavors as part of their expansion effort. This selection arrives timely for those looking to enjoy springtime sipping.

news.headline: Green hydrogen, from renewables, gains momentum in energy market with rising demand. Challenges include cost and infrastructure.
news.summary: In the sustainable energy sector, green hydrogen, crafted from renewable sources, is experiencing significant expansion as an eco-friendly alternative to cut down carbon emissions. This growth is facilitated by innovation, backing from governmental bodies, and an increasing market interest, even in the face of obstacles such as expenses and infrastructure limitations. As of February 19, 2025, the trend towards green hydrogen reflects robust momentum in combating climate change.

news.headline: FAA: Employees from Elon Musk’s DOGE team will make more agency visits on airspace reform - Email to Employees.
Nehborly.com empowers neighborhoods with NHBCoin, connecting over 50,000 users, fueling rapid growth in a social revolution.
news.summary: A novel social platform is revolutionizing networking by focusing on local interactions, leveraging NHBCoin as its native cryptocurrency to transform community engagement into tangible rewards. The platform has garnered immense traction with over 50,000 initial users, driving swift expansion. On February 19, 2025, in Dubai, UAE, Nehborly.com made the official announcement, marking a significant step in reshaping the digital networking landscape.

news.headline: Potential roadblocks could hinder a dividend for DOGE holders. More details on the situation soon.
Building Hope announces 20 charter schools as 2025 Impact Grant finalists, celebrating excellence with $160,000 in grants.
news.summary: 20 charter schools have been honored for their exceptional achievements in community engagement, educational innovation, student empowerment, and leadership. A total of $160,000 in grants will be presented at the upcoming Fourth Annual Building Hope IMPACT Summit Awards Gala taking place in Miami on May 7. This recognition highlights the dedication and success of these schools in fostering a supportive and innovative learning environment for their students.

news.headline: Appian Corp's Q4 earnings: Revenue up 15% to $166.69M, subscription revenue up 18% to $136.8M, beating estimates. Stock price rose post results.
news.summary: Appian Corp (NASDAQ: APPN) announced a 15% year-on-year revenue growth to $166.69 million for fiscal fourth-quarter 2024, surpassing the analyst consensus estimate of $164.26 million. The adjusted EPS of $0.00 exceeded the analyst consensus loss of $0.01. Following the results, the stock price rose. Subscription revenue saw a total increase of 18% year over year to $136.8 million, while professional services revenue reached $29.9 million, reflecting a 1% rise. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com. Additionally, GlobalFoundries has received an analyst upgrade and anticipates growth in the automotive sector and AI-driven data centers.

news.headline: US designates drug cartels as terrorist orgs; brings stricter penalties for associated crimes.
Luxury auction for 15-acre waterfront estate in Coastal Florida set for Mar. 8, 2025, with 600 ft frontage and 1,100-ft deepwater boat dock.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, in Jacksonville, Florida, a vast waterfront property located on the northeastern coast is set to be sold at a luxury auction on March 8, 2025. The estate covers 15 acres along the water, boasting 600 feet of frontage as well as an impressive 1,100-foot deepwater boat dock.

news.headline: Business owners to gain insights from Alan Nero, Managing Director of Octagon's Baseball Division, at Integro CEO Club event on Feb 26th in Phoenix. Over 900 influential individuals in sports management.
news.summary: On February 26, 2025, in Phoenix, business executives will have a special chance to listen to Alan Nero, the Managing Director of Octagon's Baseball Division, at the upcoming Integro CEO Club event. Nero, a prominent figure in sports management, oversees a portfolio of more than 900 influential individuals.

news.headline: Innovative Food Holdings, Inc. expands gourmet cheese program with existing retail partner.
news.summary: In an exciting development, Innovative Food Holdings, Inc. has revealed plans to expand its gourmet cheese program with a current retail partner. The expansion will involve a significant increase in the variety and quantity of gourmet cheese offerings available to customers. This move is part of the company's ongoing efforts to enhance its product range and cater to the growing demand for high-quality cheese products. With this expansion, customers can look forward to a broader selection of gourmet cheeses to choose from, providing them with more options to indulge in premium dairy products. This initiative underscores the commitment of Innovative Food Holdings, Inc. to meet the evolving needs of consumers and strengthen its position in the market.

news.headline: Galaxy Universal buys Reebok's global product ops, US license; partners with ABG for Euro ops. - PRNewswire, Feb 19, 2025.
news.summary: In a move to boost global expansion, Gainline Capital Partners' portfolio company Galaxy Universal, a prominent footwear firm, has partnered with Authentic Brands Group. This strategic collaboration has led to Galaxy Universal acquiring Reebok's worldwide product creation, sourcing, and footwear operations. The agreement, announced in New York on Feb. 19, 2025, is set to significantly enhance Galaxy Universal's market presence and growth potential.

news.headline: Alterations in the Board of Directors' composition are being made, affecting valuable stakeholders.
Litecoin price increased 10% after SEC's acknowledgement of ETF filing. Odds for ETF approval before July 31 jumped from 37% to 54%.
news.summary: Litecoin (LTC) has surged following the SEC's initial move towards a potential ETF approval. According to Polymarket data, there is an 85% likelihood of a Litecoin ETF approval by 2025, with chances for approval before July 31 rising from 37% to 54% since February 15. As of now, Litecoin is priced at $137.01 with a market cap of $10.35 billion, showing a 10.6% increase in the last 24 hours and a 14.5% increase over the past week. In comparison, Chainlink (LINK) is at $17.98 with a market cap of $11.5 billion, up 2.7% in the last 24 hours but down 3.4% over the week. TRON (TRX) is priced at $0.2426 with a market cap of $20.9 billion, showing a 4% increase in the last 24 hours but a 0.8% decrease over the week.Crypto trader Claire described Litecoin's current situation as "perfect," mentioning that the bulls only require one final push.

news.headline: RHEI introduces Made, an emotionally intelligent AI facilitating personalized dream teams for creators. VANCOUVER, BC, Feb. 19, 2025.
news.summary: A cutting-edge AI platform with emotional intelligence is revolutionizing the way creators work by providing them with a customized team of proactive and specialized AI agents. This innovation is empowering creators to unleash their creativity to the fullest. Based in Vancouver, BC, this platform was introduced on Feb. 19, 2025 by RHEI, a prominent player in content distribution and marketing for the creator economy.

news.headline: $1B in forfeiture includes private jets, political donations, and stake in Robinhood per court documents.
news.summary: According to court records, Sam Bankman-Fried has forfeited numerous assets, including two private airplanes, a significant amount of political contributions, and a substantial ownership in the company Robinhood.

news.headline: Weekly buyback program: latest share repurchase transactions, including key figures.
Voltalia’s agreement reached on Feb 19, 2025.
The ALS Association introduces ALS Insurance Navigator™ to assist ALS patients with insurance hurdles, launched on Feb. 19, 2025.
news.summary: The ALS Association recently unveiled the ALS Insurance Navigator™, a free resource designed to assist individuals within the ALS community in navigating insurance appeals and improving access to care. Launched on February 19, 2025, in Arlington, Virginia, this user-friendly tool aims to simplify the process for individuals facing insurance challenges related to ALS. This initiative comes as a response to the difficulties experienced by the ALS community, providing a valuable resource to aid in addressing their needs.

news.headline: Altcoins experience extreme volatility and negative sentiment amid market downturn, but traders remain optimistic for a potential rally.
news.summary: The recent downturn in the cryptocurrency market has resulted in a substantial decrease in the value of altcoins, causing a pessimistic outlook and heightened instability. Analysts suggest exercising patience during this phase, seeing it as an opportunity to accumulate coins before a potential upturn. Crypto expert Michael van de Poppe characterized the current altcoin market as experiencing "intense volatility" and overwhelmingly negative sentiment. He views this period as a shift from old storylines to new narratives unfolding, recommending investors to retain utility-focused altcoins as they may soon rise in value. Furthermore, trader Osemka noted that Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) initially fell below the 4-hour breaker level but promptly rebounded above it. For the complete story, please refer to Benzinga.com.

news.headline: COSI in Columbus, Ohio named #1 science museum by USA TODAY 10Best Readers' Choice Awards, setting new standards in 2025.
news.summary: COSI's Science, Technology, Engineering, Arts, and Math (STEAM) programs in Columbus, Ohio are transforming the traditional science museum experience in 2025. The immersive and interactive exhibits have garnered significant attention. On February 19, 2025, it was announced via PRNewswire that after a rigorous selection and public voting process, COSI has emerged as a frontrunner in redefining the museum landscape. The program's innovative approach and focus on hands-on learning is reshaping the future of STEAM education. This development marks a significant shift in the way visitors engage with scientific concepts and is a testament to COSI's commitment to innovation.

news.headline: Petvivo Holdings, Inc. to exhibit at Western Veterinary Conference in Las Vegas on March 2-5, 2025.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, PetVivo Holdings, Inc. disclosed its participation in the Western Veterinary Conference from March 2 to March 5, 2025, at the Mandalay Bay Convention Center in Las Vegas, Nevada. Operating under OTCQB symbols PETV and OTCPINK PETVW, PetVivo is dedicated to introducing advanced medical treatments for animals. This event marks an important platform for PetVivo to showcase its innovative products within the industry.

news.headline: Pitney Bowes named Top Company in Shipping Software for 2025 by Logistics Tech Outlook, servicing 90% of Fortune 500.
news.summary: In Stamford, Connecticut, Pitney Bowes (NYSE: PBI) has been acknowledged as the leading company in Shipping Software for 2025 by Logistics Tech Outlook. The company, known for its SaaS shipping solutions, mailing innovations, and financial services, serves clients globally, with over 90% of the Fortune 500 on board. Logistics Tech Outlook, a respected enterprise technology magazine among logistics industry executives, bestowed this honor on Pitney Bowes.

news.headline: 10 crypto issuers approved by EU's MiCA with Tether excluded, impacting growth, competitiveness, and tech innovation.
news.summary: The European Union remains at the forefront globally in terms of regulations, yet this achievement comes with consequences such as a hindrance to economic growth, competitiveness, and technological innovation.

news.headline: Riverside Art Museum and The Cheech plan exhibitions until 2025, $29M impact on economy, 228,000 visitors in 2 years.
news.summary: In the span of two years, The Cheech Marin Center for Chicano Art & Culture of the Riverside Art Museum in Riverside, Calif., has made a significant impact, amounting to $29 million, and attracted nearly 228,000 visitors. The center has solidified Riverside's status as a thriving cultural hub, indicating a bright future ahead.

news.headline: Halper Sadeh LLC probes JTAI, GB, AZPN for shareholder rights violations in potential securities law breaches.
news.summary: A New York-based law firm, Halper Sadeh LLC, is currently conducting an investigation into various companies for potential breaches of fiduciary responsibilities and violations of federal securities laws. Among these companies is Jet.AI Inc. (NASDAQ: JTAI), which is being scrutinized over the sale of its assets. Investors are urged to stay informed as the investigation progresses to protect their rights.

news.headline: Currito saw significant growth in 2024 with 16 new units developing and plans to continue expansion with nine new deals.
news.summary: A fast-casual restaurant with global influences, Currito, based in Cincinnati, had a successful year in 2024. The restaurant chain is set to further expand in 2025, with plans for opening 16 new locations. Currito is known for its diverse menu offerings that cater to various palates, and their growth reflects a positive response from communities.

news.headline: Bitcoin hitting $100,000 marks beginning of rising institutional interest, says Samson Mow. Predicts a long-term bullish trend.
news.summary: Mow anticipates numerous factors aligning to spur a significant surge in Bitcoin prices, predicting a prolonged period of bullish activity lasting potentially 10 to 20 years.

news.headline: Company buys back 100,000 of its shares in transaction.
Jameson partners with LA Galaxy as the Official Irish Whiskey Sponsor, uniting fans in MLS deal.
news.summary: A recent collaboration has been unveiled in Los Angeles, as MLS, Jameson®, and the LA Galaxy have joined forces in a local partnership. This agreement designates Jameson as the Official Irish Whiskey Sponsor of the LA Galaxy, the current MLS Cup champions.

news.headline: 2026 Ski-Doo models introduce many improvements, Expedition shifts to REV Gen5 platform, Deep Snow models are lighter with new features, lineup enhancements to enhance rider experience.
news.summary: The Expedition model has been upgraded to the REV Gen5 platform and now includes a new rear suspension system, enhancing both comfort and capability. Additionally, the Deep Snow models have been redesigned to be lighter weight and feature new elements, offering more possibilities. A range of new features have been integrated throughout the lineup to enhance the overall riding experience. The Sport and Neo models have transitioned to a new platform as well.

news.headline: Triller Group celebrates success of 4 verticals at Nasdaq Opening Bell; CEO Wing-Fai Ng and Triller App CEO Sean Kim share vision.
news.summary: During the Opening Bell ceremony at Nasdaq, Triller Group Inc. showcased its increasing success across its four verticals. Triller Group CEO Wing-Fai Ng and Triller App CEO Sean Kim outlined their strategic vision for the company. The event took place in Los Angeles on February 19, 2025. The speech emphasized the group's achievements in various areas, illustrating a promising future for the company.

news.headline: The Whole Child opens new housing center in Santa Fe Springs, CA with SVA Architects. Grand Opening on Feb. 1, 2025.
news.summary: A milestone achievement was reached by the "Homeless to Homeowner Campus" in Santa Fe Springs, California. The project, located in Santa Ana, saw SVA Architects team up with The Whole Child and other development partners for the Grand Opening event on February 1, 2025. This initiative aims to provide housing solutions for the homeless, marking a significant step towards addressing homelessness in the area. The project signifies progress in transitioning individuals from homelessness to homeownership, with images of the campus available for viewing.

news.headline: Dr. Benhuri named a Castle Connolly Top Doctor for 2025; transitioned to membership-based practice in Beverly Hills.
news.summary: Renowned primary care physician Dr. Daniel Benhuri of Beverly Hills has earned the prestigious title of Castle Connolly Top Doctor for the year 2025. In a bid to improve patient care and increase accessibility, Dr. Benhuri is moving towards a membership-based practice model. The news was announced in Beverly Hills, California, on February 19, 2025.
